stories.title: Red Sox Win 14 Straight — One Win from Franchise History
stories.angle: The franchise record is one win away. Tonight is the night. The 1946 team that set this record went to the World Series. The 2026 team is trying to get back to October.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Red Sox have won 14 games in a row.

Last night they beat the Orioles 6-5 on a Caleb Durbin HR in the 8th.

Tonight, they can tie the franchise record: 15 straight wins, set in 1946.

The 1946 team went to the World Series. #RedSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The 1946 Red Sox ran off 15 straight wins.

That team had Ted Williams. Johnny Pesky. Bobby Doerr. Dom DiMaggio.

80 years later, the 2026 Red Sox need one more win tonight to tie it.

They haven't been this hot since 2006. #RedSox #MLB

article.headline: One Win from 80 Years of Franchise History

stories.title: Ohtani Knee Forces Start Cancellation — Timeline Unclear
stories.angle: The best two-way player in baseball is now one-way — and nobody knows when the other way comes back. His Cy Young hopes are in genuine jeopardy.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani's next start has been canceled.

Left knee inflammation. Fluid drained over the All-Star break. He told training staff the knee wasn't ready.

Dave Roberts: "It's gonna be some time."

No IL. Still hitting. But his Cy Young push just got a lot harder. #Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Ohtani's Next Start Is Off. The Timeline Is Unknown. His Cy Young Push Is in Jeopardy.

stories.title: Skubal Trade — 13 Days Left, Braves Emerge as Frontrunner
stories.angle: The most in-demand pitcher on the market wants to stay where he is. The team that has him is thinking about keeping him. And there are still 13 days to change everyone's mind.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Tarik Skubal trade update: 13 days to the Aug. 3 deadline.

Per Nightengale, the Braves are the frontrunner. Cubs, Rays, Dodgers, Astros also engaged.

Skubal has told close friends he wants to stay in Detroit.

The Tigers are "inclined to keep" him. For now. #MLB

article.headline: The Pitcher Who Wants to Stay, the Team That's Thinking About It, and 13 Days Left to Decide

stories.title: White Sox at 52-46 — One of Baseball's Greatest Turnarounds
stories.angle: The White Sox are for real — and the numbers now say the same thing.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The White Sox are 52-46 and leading the AL Central.

In 2024 they lost 121 games. In 2025 they went 60-102.

A 30-win improvement matches only 7 teams in baseball history.

Colson Montgomery has 21 HRs. Nobody saw this coming. #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: From 121 Losses to Leading the Division: The White Sox Are Real

stories.title: Diamondbacks Walk Off Cardinals from 7-Run Deficit
stories.angle: Nolan Arenado beat his old team with career hit No. 1,999 and a 2-run home run. The Cardinals blew a lead that size for the first time in 16 years.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Sunday: Arizona trailed the Cardinals 7-0.

In the 8th, Nolan Arenado homered off his former team for career hit No. 1,999.

In the 10th, Max Kepler hit a walk-off double.

Final: Diamondbacks 8, Cardinals 7. Arizona's largest comeback in franchise history. #Dbacks #MLB

article.headline: Arenado Beat His Old Team. Then Kepler Finished It Off. Arizona Had Never Done This Before.
